packageRules.description: This library is pinned to Spring Framework 5.3.x. Spring 6+ requires Jakarta EE + Java 17+; consumers (portlets) are still on javax.servlet and Java 11.
The 2.x releases preserve the javax.xml.bind.* package namespace. 3+ moves to jakarta.xml.bind as part of Jakarta EE 9+.
Servlet API 5+ is in the Jakarta EE namespace. Consumers of this library run on Tomcat 8.5/9 (Servlet 3.1) under javax.servlet.
JSP API 3.x moves to the jakarta.servlet.jsp package. Consumers remain on javax.
plexus-archiver 4.10+ requires a newer commons-io than the one bundled with maven-war-plugin 3.4.0.
Mockito 5 uses the inline MockMaker by default; its bundled byte-buddy references ClassFileVersion.JAVA_V21. Stay on Mockito 4.x until byte-buddy can be reconciled.
